channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Kerb repair or supposed to be, 14th April
item.description:
Kerb reported work carried absolutely so bad
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flying tipping near 121 or123 Casterbridge Estate, 14th April
item.description:
Flying tipping near 121 or123 Casterbridge Estate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenside Grove, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Front garden hedge overhanging pavement, 14th April
item.description:
No. 40 Victoria Road has a front garden hedge that overhangs the pavement. This means there is either no pedestrian access along the footpath if cars parked on the pavement park to leave enough room for vehicles to get down the street, or if space is left for pedestrians to use the pavement, cars parked on the pavement are so far into the street that the flow of traffic is obstructed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New potholes across the road, 14th April
item.description:
New potholes across the road, Westmoor Street, just south of the RMS depot. The RMS trucks will tear this up in no time. The road here needs sorting, the holes are huge. Like 4-ft huge.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmoor Street, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: My car has Difficulty coming out of my Drive, 14th April
item.description:
My motability vehicle has Difficulty coming out of my Drive way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Geraint Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bus Station - Damage to road or pavement within the Bus Station

item.title: Next to zebra crossing, 14th April
item.description:
The manhole cover is making a very annoying rattling noise, which is distracting, and given its location next to a place of study, (The Warburg Institute and Library) is a great annoyance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gordon Square, St Pancras, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ramp obstructing pavement and glass sheet on floor, 14th April
item.description:
Praan Sweets - 77 Turnpike Lane-N80EE,North London,UK The ramp is constantly in front of the shop severely restricting the width of the pavement and providing a potential trip hazard. The ramp should be created within the shops envelope. Items are wheeled across or trays dragged across a filthy pavement into food preparation area? Really? Doesn’t that contravene food hygiene legislation? This corner is a magnet for rubbish, the flat glass panel on the floor has been here for a week… it should have at least been made safe. What is a bigger issue is why nothing has been done about these problems. Who is responsible for oversight and enforcement?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Turnpike Lane, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter not available and no seats available for anybody to sit down, 14th April
item.description:
Bus shelter not available and no seats available for anybody to sit down
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clapham Common South Side, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive amounts of fly tipping, 14th April
item.description:
This has been here and been reported as fix when it is not fixed and only build g up massively. Been there and building since the Easter weekend with no cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmbridge Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shame on Hackney Council for giving these nuisance bikes licenses and permits to be on our streets causing antisocial behavior and injuries to members of public, damages to people's vehicles bikes being left everywhere causing obstructions and nuisance., 14th April
item.description:
Shame on Hackney Council for allowing these Ebikes to be on our street and giving them permits when they call severe injuries to members of public. What is the mayor of Hackney doing about these nuisance E bikes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reading Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge has been flytipped on the pavement in Westbrooke Road, 14th April
item.description:
Fridge has been flytipped on the pavement in Westbrooke Road - can this be collected asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbrooke Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste, 14th April
item.description:
Woodbridge Court has a lovely community, and everyone takes great care of the shared garden. Could Hackney please arrange to empty the garden waste bin on the street, provide the community with access keys, and remove the accumulated garden waste?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant fly tipping, 14th April
item.description:
Multiple rubbish bags dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weld Place, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside the Old Town Hall Hogh Holborn, 14th April
item.description:
There are three rocking manhole covers here that are very noisy especially when buses go over them. Please can they be repaired? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Oxford Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed drain - pot hole, 14th April
item.description:
The presence of a severe pothole believed to be due to a collapsed drain situated directly between a busy road junction and a primary bus stop creates a high-risk environment for all road users. For motorists, this can cause sudden tire blowouts or rim damage, leading to a loss of steering control at a critical point where vehicles are merging or turning. Motorcyclists and cyclists face an even greater threat; hitting such a cavity can result in immediate ejection from the vehicle, potentially throwing the rider into the path of oncoming traffic or beneath the wheels of a departing bus.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped fridge, 14th April
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruthin Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 14th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep, hard to see hole on grass lawn at cromwell avenue, 14th April
item.description:
This hole has been here for years. Its very deep (hard to tell but definitely quite a few metres) and just wide enough for someone to get their foot or leg stuck in it. Sometimes if the grass grows over it, it can be very difficult to make out. Inside + down the hole is concrete, not dirt. Definitely a safety hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste and rubble dumped, 14th April
item.description:
Please could it be cleared. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Longleigh Lane, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Abandoned clothes
